title: deyeuxia calderillensis
intro: Deyeuxia calderillensis, also known as Calder's grass or Calder's deyeuxia, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Deyeuxia calderillensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Deyeuxia calderillensis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent, and then consuming the resulting liquid as a tea or supplement.
